This market is if access is restored to US customers. Access can be restored for US customers with KYC Citizenship verification. The other market you mentioned is if they rescind the ban on foreigners/non citizens using it. They can allow access to US customers only to comply with the export control. In other words this market goes to "Yes" if either they rescind the export control entirely, or if Anthropic implements KYC for US citizens only to be able to use it. The other market only resolves to "Yes" if the export control is rescinded, but not if Anthropic opens up access to US citizens only.
